benchmarks.name: MedHELM (Stanford)
benchmarks.description: Stanford CRFM holistic medical eval — 5 categories, 22 subcategories, 121 tasks (29 clinicians), 35 benchmarks. DeepSeek R1 66% win-rate, o3-mini 64%, Claude 3.5 Sonnet at 40% lower cost

benchmarks.name: MedHELM Clinical Decision Support
benchmarks.description: MedHELM Clinical Decision Support category — diagnostic + treatment reasoning. Models perform 0.56-0.72 on normalized accuracy

benchmarks.name: MedHELM Administration & Workflow
benchmarks.description: MedHELM administrative + workflow tasks — billing, scheduling, documentation. Models 0.53-0.63

benchmarks.name: MedHELM Clinical Note Generation
benchmarks.description: MedHELM clinical note generation — discharge summaries, progress notes. Models perform strongly (0.73-0.85)

benchmarks.name: MedHELM Patient Communication
benchmarks.description: MedHELM patient communication & education — explanation, empathy. Models 0.78-0.83

benchmarks.name: MedHELM Medical Research Assistance
benchmarks.description: MedHELM medical research assistance — literature review, hypothesis generation. Models 0.65-0.75

benchmarks.name: AgentClinic-MedQA
benchmarks.description: Sequential decision-making clinical agent — USMLE-grounded patient interactions. Claude-3.5 leads. GPT-4 52%, GPT-3.5 38%. Drops to <10% of original MedQA accuracy

benchmarks.name: AgentClinic-NEJM
benchmarks.description: Multimodal clinical agent — NEJM image-centric diagnostic cases. Multimodal accuracy ~29.2% baseline (low difficulty signal)

benchmarks.name: MedAgentBench (NEJM AI 2025)
benchmarks.description: Virtual EHR agent benchmark — 300 patient-specific clinically-derived tasks, 100 patient profiles, 700K data elements, FHIR-compliant interactive environment

benchmarks.name: MedAgentsBench (Complex Reasoning)
benchmarks.description: MedAgentsBench — thinking models + agent frameworks for complex medical reasoning. arXiv 2503.07459

benchmarks.name: MultiMedQA Suite
benchmarks.description: Aggregated suite — MedQA + MedMCQA + PubMedQA + MMLU clinical + LiveQA + MedicationQA + HealthSearchQA. Med-PaLM original benchmark

benchmarks.name: MedMNIST v2 (Biomedical Image Classification)
benchmarks.description: Large-scale MNIST-like biomedical image collection — 708,069 2D + 10,214 3D images across 18 datasets. CT/MRI/X-ray/OCT/Ultrasound/EM modalities

benchmarks.name: EHRNoteQA
benchmarks.description: MIMIC-IV EHR-grounded clinical QA — questions over discharge summaries / progress notes / radiology reports

benchmarks.name: EchoBench (LVLM Sycophancy)
benchmarks.description: Medical LVLM sycophancy benchmark — measures how models capitulate to incorrect physician suggestions

benchmarks.name: DermaBench (Dermatology VQA)
benchmarks.description: Clinician-annotated dermatology VQA on Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI). Skin tone fairness eval

benchmarks.name: DermaVQA-DAS
benchmarks.description: DermaVQA extension — closed-ended QA + dermatological lesion segmentation

benchmarks.name: MedRepBench (Medical Report VLM)
benchmarks.description: VLM/LLM evaluation on structured medical report understanding — reports across modalities

benchmarks.name: PathMCQA (Pathology MCQ)
benchmarks.description: Multiple-choice pathology QA — questions on histopathology images derived from multiple pathology sources

benchmarks.name: UKBOB (UK Biobank Organs)
benchmarks.description: Largest labeled body-organ MRI dataset from UK Biobank — automated labeling + manual validation

benchmarks.name: HISTAI WSI Dataset
benchmarks.description: Open large-scale whole slide image dataset for pathology — addresses scale + diversity gap in public pathology data

benchmarks.name: BEETLE (Breast Cancer Seg)
benchmarks.description: Multicentric H&E breast cancer semantic segmentation. Biopsy + surgical resection slides

benchmarks.name: SPIDER (Multi-organ Pathology)
benchmarks.description: Multi-organ supervised pathology dataset — expert annotations + strong baselines

benchmarks.name: ClinicalBench (LLM vs ML for Prediction)
benchmarks.description: Compares LLMs against traditional ML models on clinical outcome prediction tasks (mortality / readmission / length-of-stay)

benchmarks.name: BioProBench (Biological Protocols)
benchmarks.description: Biological protocol understanding + reasoning — large corpus of human-written protocols

benchmarks.name: Long-form Virology Tasks
benchmarks.description: Agentic eval for end-to-end pathogen acquisition processes — biorisk uplift measurement

benchmarks.name: MedQA Vals AI Leaderboard
benchmarks.description: Vals AI MedQA leaderboard — Apr 2026: o4-mini-high 95.2, Gemini 2.5 Pro 94.6, Claude 3.7 Sonnet 92.3

benchmarks.name: MedArena (Stanford HAI)
benchmarks.description: Stanford HAI MedArena — head-to-head LLM comparison for medicine in the wild. Clinician vote-based pairwise preference

scores._note: LLM vs traditional ML — mixed results
XGBoost still beats LLMs on tabular EHR prediction
Stanford HAI MedArena Elo (estimate). Unit is Bradley-Terry Elo, NOT a percentage
